links.note: Banana illustration is the central visual element of the icon
Rounded-square yellow/golden background typical of iOS/Android app icons
Icon at 180px is standard Apple Touch / PWA icon size; banana motif matches project name 'bananovnik' (Slovak/Czech for banana seller or banana-related app)
Banana graphic visually encodes the brand name 'bananovnik'
Warm yellow palette reinforces banana/fruit theme
SVG file is a banana icon
File is named favicon.svg at project root, inferred to be the app favicon
Comment in SVG: via SVG Repo
Comment in SVG: CC Attribution License
fill=#4aa86a used for banana stem/leaf area
Banana icon likely chosen as logo/brand for Bananovnik (banana-themed app)
links.rationale: App is named 'bananovnik' (banana-related word in Czech/Slovak) and its icon depicts bananas
Image visually shows two bananas as the central graphic element
Banana stem has a small green accent color
File is named icon-512.png in bananovnik project directory
Background of the icon is a warm yellow color
Icon uses a rounded square (squircle) shape typical of mobile app icons
Banana illustration uses thick dark maroon/brown outlines with white fill — flat icon style
Filename icon-512.png suggests 512x512 resolution standard for app icons (iOS/Android)
